calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
David Mendez, Esq., for Plaintiff: Davendra Patel, also present.
No appearance by the Defendants: Anne Marie Yantes and Daniel T. Simpson.
09:50 am. - Plaintiff was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice --------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at: 948 Mission St., #47, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $2,835
Costs of $218.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DEVENDRA PATEL, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA
ANNE MARIE YANTES, DEFENDANT IN PROPRIA PERSONA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. NO SETTLEMENT REACHED. TRIAL DATE OF FEB.17,2004 REMAINS.

JUDGE PROTEM: ANNE HIPSHMAN; CLERK: EDITH ESTACIO (304A)
